name: The New Testament You Never Knew
original_name: The New Testament You Never Knew
overview: Do you know the real story behind the New Testament? We all share a fascination for discovering ‘the rest of the story.’ Through reading the New Testament we discover that God indeed keeps his promises, but those promises don’t always look like what people expected. Especially when it comes to Jesus. Join well-known Bible scholars N.T. Wright and Michael F. Bird as they team up to take you on a tour of the explosive story behind the story of the New Testament.

trailers.title: The New Testament You Never Knew Video Series - N. T. Wright, Michael F. Bird
